description_long: This apartment building features a rectangular brick exterior with a flat roof and a large wraparound balcony or terrace on one side, enclosed by glass railings. The structure appears to have two main floors, with the upper floor containing several rooms and the lower level partially visible. The balcony is furnished with outdoor seating, tables, and potted plants, suggesting communal or recreational use. Windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The building is set on a green lawn with some landscaping, including bushes and small trees. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, rectangular brick apartment building with a large glass-railed balcony, grid-patterned windows, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: This view shows the brick facade with several windows and a partial view of the balcony and terrace area.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the expansive glass-railed balcony, outdoor furniture, and landscaped greenery below.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the large terrace with seating and plants, as well as the main entrance and a prominent window arrangement.
description_view_3: The rear view displays a solid brick wall with multiple windows and a partial view of the balcony extending from the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with consistent spacing and alignment across the building's facades.
